title: resident ghost in Sirius building resident ghost
publication_or_organisation: Myra Demetriou's life in Millers Point; ABC Sydney Weekend Mornings
australian_relation: ABC Sydney public oral-history style interview describing a resident ghost in the Sirius building at The Rocks.
evidence_summary: ABC Sydney reported that Myra Demetriou, one of the remaining social housing residents in the Sirius building at The Rocks, had lived there for a decade and was happy cohabiting with a resident ghost.
